title: Genotyping Protocol Using DNEasy Kit and PCR
author: Brandon Willis
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.yjifuke
materials: PCR with the following thermal conditions
Inject 75% reaction volume into well (15 ul).

steps.title: Make a cocktail of ATL with...
steps.instruction: Make a cocktail of ATL with 180uL buffer ATL and 20uL Proteinase K. Add 200uL to each tube. Be sure tail snip is submerged.

steps.title: Incubate at 55°C for 6-12 hours...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 55°C for 6-12 hours in heat block or water bath.

steps.title: Remove tubes from heat source and vortex
steps.instruction: Remove tubes from heat source and vortex.

steps.title: Add 400 ul of AL/Ethanol mixture to each tube
steps.instruction: Add 400 ul of AL/Ethanol mixture to each tube. Vortex.

steps.title: Pour liquid into an appropriately labeled Qiagen spin column
steps.instruction: Pour liquid into an appropriately labeled Qiagen spin column. Centrifuge at 8,000 rpm for 1 minute. NoteAL/Ethanol mixture is 1 part AL buffer to an equal part of Ethanol. Usually made 50 ml at a time, with 25 ml of AL and 25 ml of 200 proof (100%) Ethanol.

steps.title: Transfer spin column to a new...
steps.instruction: Transfer spin column to a new collection tube and add 500 ul of AW

steps.title: Be sure ethanol (200 proof) has...
steps.instruction: Be sure ethanol (200 proof) has been added to AW1 buffer; if you add ethanol to AW buffer, be sure to mark the bottle. Spin at 8,000 rpm for 1 minute.

steps.title: Transfer spin column to new collection tube
steps.instruction: Transfer spin column to new collection tube. Add 500 ul of AW

steps.title: Again, be sure 200 proof ethanol has been added
steps.instruction: Again, be sure 200 proof ethanol has been added. Spin at max speed (14,000 rpm) for 3 minutes.

steps.title: Carefully remove tubes from centrifuge
steps.instruction: Carefully remove tubes from centrifuge. Transfer to a 1.5 ml microtube. Check each spin column for Ethanol before placing in the microtube! If ethanol is still on the spin column, pour off the fluid from the collection tube and spin again for 1 minute at 14,000 rpm. Residual ethanol may inhibit PCR!

steps.title: Add 200 ul of Buffer AE...
steps.instruction: Add 200 ul of Buffer AE (elution buffer) to spin columns in microcentrifuge tubes. Incubate at room temp for 2 minutes. Spin at 8,000 rpm for 1 minute.

steps.title: Once you have eluted twice (for...
steps.instruction: Once you have eluted twice (for a total of 200 ul in each tube), label each tube with the sample info that was put on the spin column. Be sure to date the first, last, and approximately every fifth tube for each batch of tails. Store in a cardboard box in the 4oC refrigerator for short term and -20oC for long term. Warning: use appropriate PPE at all times including lab coat, gloves, and eye protection.

steps.title: Prepare the following master mix on ice:
steps.instruction: Prepare the following master mix on ice:

steps.title: Briefly vortex master mix and transfer 18
steps.instruction: Briefly vortex master mix and transfer 18.8 uL of to each 200ul thin walled reaction tube on ice.

steps.title: Briefly vortex DNA and input 1
steps.instruction: Briefly vortex DNA and input 1.2 uL of ~100 ng DNA into reaction tube.

steps.title: Prepare a 1
steps.instruction: Prepare a 1.2% TBE Agarose gel (~1min per 100ml) with 10ul SyberSafe per 100ml agarose.

steps.title: Line pipette tips with Loading Dye...
steps.instruction: Line pipette tips with Loading Dye and mix with finished PCR reaction.

steps.title: Run gel at 120 volts for 1
steps.instruction: Run gel at 120 volts for 1.5 hours in TBE. TBE just covering the gel.

steps.title: Image under UV and adjust and store image for record
steps.instruction: Image under UV and adjust and store image for record.

steps.title: Controls
steps.instruction: Controls: non-template control, isogenic wild type, 1kb plus ladder. (positive control if available). Warning* where UV protection during imaging.
